channel.title: Go on Eric's Software Engineering Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Go on Eric's Software Engineering Blog

item.title: Retrieval Augmented Generation with Vertex AI and Go
item.description: Working with Google Cloud's Vertex AI Vector Search features for RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation)

item.title: Web scraping TripAdvisor Hotel Reviews with Go Colly and Applescript
item.description: I am forced to scrape TripAdvisor Hotel Reviews with Go Colly and Applescript.

item.title: Alpaca - Hotel Quality Recommendations
item.description: A Go microservice for analyzing hotel data, RAG engine and providing LLM-powered recommendations with RAG.
